title: Make Costs of Paths Equal in a Binary Tree
titleCn: 使二叉树所有路径值相等的最小代价

testcases.input: n = 7, cost = [1,5,2,2,3,3,1] Output: 6 Explanation: We can do the following increments: - Increase the cost of node 4 one time. - Increase the cost of node 3 three times. - Increase the cost of node 7 two times. Each path from the root to a leaf will have a total cost of 9. The total increments we did is 1 + 3 + 2 = 6. It can be shown that this is the minimum answer we can achieve.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: We can do the following increments: - Increase the cost of node 4 one time. - Increase the cost of node 3 three times. - Increase the cost of node 7 two times. Each path from the root to a leaf will have a total cost of 9. The total increments we did is 1 + 3 + 2 = 6. It can be shown that this is the minimum answer we can achieve.

testcases.input: n = 3, cost = [5,3,3] Output: 0 Explanation: The two paths already have equal total costs, so no increments are needed.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The two paths already have equal total costs, so no increments are needed.
